template.name: Course Module — Academic Forge Bundle
template.description: Professional 8-slide training module with full-bleed backgrounds, forest and gold palette, Poppins and Source Serif typography, circular cover hero, framework cards, and knowledge-check closing.

scenes.title: Module Cover
scenes.description: Full-bleed background with circular hero, gold arcs, and bold display typography.

clips.content: A complete training module designed for professional instruction. Replace this copy with your course promise, audience, and what learners will be able to do after finishing this lesson.
Use this slide to set expectations, highlight prerequisites, and preview the skills covered in the next several scenes.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Training Overview
scenes.description: Warm background image with objectives grid and white info cards.

clips.content: This module helps participants understand a clear work process and apply it more confidently in everyday tasks. Learners will move from theory to practice with guided examples.
By the end of this section, everyone should know the outcomes, the tools required, and how success will be measured.
Grasp the core ideas, vocabulary, and context before moving into hands-on practice.
Use the process in real tasks with confidence and consistent quality.
Spot common mistakes early and know how to correct them quickly.
Practice until each step feels natural and repeatable on the job.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Core Framework
scenes.description: Four-stage framework with diamond graphic and matching info cards.

clips.content: Explore the main stages of this module. Each stage builds on the previous one so learners always know where they are in the journey.
Collect context, materials, and stakeholder needs before you begin the workflow.
Organize ideas into a clear sequence that everyone on the team can follow.
Walk through the process with examples, checkpoints, and quality criteria.
Confirm understanding, capture lessons learned, and define next actions.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Concept 01
scenes.description: Organic header panel with full-width hero image and lesson copy.

clips.content: Introduce the first concept in plain language. Explain what it is, when learners use it, and why it matters for their daily work. Connect the idea to a real task they already perform.
Add a short example, a common mistake to avoid, and one sentence on how this concept supports the larger workflow taught in this module.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Process Steps
scenes.description: Three-step workflow on photographic background with elevated cards.

clips.content: A repeatable three-step process learners can use on the job every time this task appears.
Gather inputs, tools, and context. Confirm roles and success criteria before work begins.
Follow the standard process step by step. Pause at checkpoints to verify quality.
Check outcomes against expectations and capture lessons learned for the next cycle.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Example
scenes.description: Practical scenario with large workshop image and callout quote.

clips.content: Walk through a realistic scenario step by step. Show what good looks like, call out common mistakes, and explain how the process prevents rework and confusion across teams.
Invite learners to picture themselves in this situation and identify which step they would take first when applying the process on the job.
"When teams follow this sequence, handoffs are clearer and errors drop significantly."

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Key Takeaways
scenes.description: Recap pillars on photographic background with frosted cards.

clips.content: Three essential points to remember before moving on to the knowledge check and next module.
Connect each step back to the learner outcome and the business result you are trying to achieve.
Use the same sequence every time so quality stays predictable across the team.
Short exercises and real examples beat long theory when building lasting skills.

backgroundConfig.hint: Use preset colors, a custom swatch, or a full-bleed image. Delete a hero image to reveal the color panel behind it.

scenes.title: Knowledge Check
scenes.description: Quiz on dark forest background with next-module CTA.

clips.content: Which step comes first when applying this process in a real task?
Continue with applied exercises and a final skills check.
